generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Dynamic lighting control system configured via TwinLight framework for occupancy-based dimming and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoRuntimeController
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental regulation system including valves and fans controlled through Ditto middleware for temperature/humidity management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoRuntimeController
]

instance ReinforcementLearningController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "BOREALIS framework-based controller that adapts operational parameters (lighting levels, energy consumption) using real-time sensor data and iterative optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoRuntimeController
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BorealisFramework
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancyPIRSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Passive Infrared occupancy sensor for adaptive lighting control and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance ThermalCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Thermal imaging sensor for occupancy detection and indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor for HVAC system regulation and energy management"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor for indoor air quality monitoring and HVAC optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Carbon dioxide sensor for ventilation system control and indoor air quality assessment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption meter for building-level energy tracking and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyPIRSensor, ThermalCameraSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched IFC model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building components and relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToDittoTransformer
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance RuntimeMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted during deployment including device configurations (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses), control policies, and sensor schemas"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DeviceConfigurationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoRuntimeConfiguration
]

instance ThermalSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based thermal simulation embedded in DT for predictive analytics and what-if scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoRuntimeController
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance HistoricalEnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series energy consumption datasets stored in InfluxDB for trend analysis and machine learning"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance VisualizationAssets : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets including 3D models and interactive dashboards for immersive monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMCoreModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RevitBIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM software for creating and enriching the semantic backbone of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMToDittoTransformer
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelEnrichmentService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data ingestion and normalization middleware using MQTT/HTTP protocols to standardize sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:enables EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceConfigurationDataTransmitted
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime management middleware enabling bidirectional communication and tenant-based device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DittoRuntimeController
    DTDFVocab:enables ReinforcementLearningController
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization platform for immersive monitoring and stakeholder engagement"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealEngineVisualizer
    DTDFVocab:enables StakeholderDashboardService
]

instance BIMToDittoTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool for automated IFC-to-Ditto mappings generating runtime artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables DittoRuntimeConfiguration
]

instance BorealisFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework for adaptive control policies and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReinforcementLearningController
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of operational metrics (energy consumption, occupancy patterns) via Unreal Engine 5 interactive dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACPerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based optimization for adaptive lighting and energy efficiency using BOREALIS framework"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlAction
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven generation of runtime interfaces (Ditto tenants, Hono device configurations) from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ZeroTouchProvisioningAction
]

instance ServiceExtensibilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points allowing integration of custom services via plug-and-play plugins"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationAction
]

instance LifeCycleManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Support for design-to-operation transitions including as-built vs. as-designed comparisons and refurbishment planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignToOperationAction
    DTDFVocab:provides RefurbishmentPlanningAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of occupancy patterns for workspace utilization analysis"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption trends and 15-20% savings potential via adaptive systems"
]

instance HVACPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Thermal and ventilation performance metrics for indoor air quality assessment"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of lighting levels and HVAC parameters based on reinforcement learning optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Occupancy-based dynamic lighting control reducing energy consumption"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ZeroTouchProvisioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of DT components without manual configuration"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Plug-and-play integration of AI-driven fault detection or maintenance scheduling services"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesignToOperationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Seamless transition from design models to operational DT with validation metrics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RefurbishmentPlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of refurbishment plans based on DT lifecycle analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Additional Data Transmitted for Configuration
instance DeviceConfigurationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EclipseHono
]

// Ditto Runtime Components
instance DittoRuntimeController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Centralized Ditto tenant managing runtime state, control logic, and service orchestration"
    DTDFVocab:enables LightingActuator
    DTDFVocab:enables HVACActuator
    DTDFVocab:enables DittoRuntimeConfiguration
]

instance DittoRuntimeConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Configuration data for Ditto tenants including device hierarchies and control policies"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DeviceConfigurationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoRuntimeController
]

// Visualization Service
instance UnrealEngineVisualizer : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization platform enabling immersive monitoring and stakeholder engagement"
    DTDFVocab:provides StakeholderDashboardInsight
]

instance StakeholderDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard for facility managers to monitor performance and engineers to debug systems"
]

// Predictive Maintenance Service
instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection service using ML models trained on historical data for predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertAction
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance MaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts for sensor failures and HVAC inefficiencies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of equipment malfunctions and performance degradation"
]

// Model Enrichment Service
instance ModelEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extension of BIM models with device configurations and control logic via TwinLight/BOREALIS frameworks"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMEnrichmentAction
]

instance BIMEnrichmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated addition of sensor schemas and control policies to BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// New instances to support the relationships
instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for energy optimization calculations and recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance StakeholderDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing dashboard functionality for stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides StakeholderDashboardInsight
]

instance BIMDeviceConfigurations : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Device configurations extracted from BIM model for Ditto tenant provisioning"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMCoreModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToDittoTransformer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is achieved through **bidirectional control commands** generated by the DT and executed on the physical system via **Eclipse Ditto**. The process includes:
  - **Control logic execution**: The DT processes real-time data (e.g., occupancy trends, energy usage) and generates **control signals** (e.g., adjust lighting levels, trigger HVAC adjustments) based on predefined policies (e.g., energy optimization rules from **BOREALIS**).
  - **Command dispatch**: Ditto routes these commands to **physical actuators** (e.g., lighting dimmers, HVAC valves) via **Eclipse Hono**, which ensures secure and authenticated communication.
  - **Feedback loop**: Actuator responses (e.g., confirmed adjustments) are relayed back to the DT for **real-time validation** and iterative optimization. The framework supports **declarative control policies** embedded in the BIM model, enabling automated commissioning and runtime adaptation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **multiple time scales**, synchronized with the physical system’s operational rhythms:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Bidirectional data exchange occurs at **millisecond to second intervals** (e.g., sensor readings, actuator commands) via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, ensuring low-latency interaction.
  - **Iterative optimization**: Reinforcement learning policies (e.g., in **BOREALIS**) update control strategies at **hourly to daily intervals**, adapting to occupancy patterns and energy demands.
  - **Long-term analytics**: Historical data (e.g., energy trends, maintenance logs) is aggregated at **weekly to monthly intervals** for **life-cycle performance evaluation** and predictive maintenance. The framework supports **time-series databases** (e.g., InfluxDB) for scalable storage and querying."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular system** with the following components:
  - **BIM Integration Layer**: Extracts and validates **device metadata** from the BIM model for Ditto/Hono configuration.
  - **Runtime Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Ditto** manages the DT’s **runtime state**, **control logic**, and **service orchestration**, while **Eclipse Hono** handles **data ingestion** and **authentication**.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides **interactive 3D dashboards** for stakeholders, enabling **real-time monitoring** and **control**.
  - **Extensibility Layer**: Standardized **APIs and extension points** allow integration of **third-party services** (e.g., AI analytics, maintenance scheduling) without modifying core DT logic.
  - **Data Storage Layer**: **Time-series databases** (e.g., InfluxDB) store **historical and real-time data** for analytics and reporting. The constellation supports **horizontal scaling** for large-scale deployments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life-cycle stages** of the building infrastructure, from **design to operation to refurbishment**:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with **device metadata** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) and **control logic** (e.g., TwinLight policies) for **as-designed** simulation.
  - **Construction phase**: The DT is **provisioned** via model-driven deployment, integrating **as-built** data (e.g., actual sensor placements) into the virtual model.
  - **Operation phase**: The DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and energy optimization** using runtime data.
  - **Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports **adaptive reconfiguration** of control systems (e.g., adding new sensors) and **performance benchmarking** against historical data. The framework ensures **backward compatibility** with legacy BIM models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: BIM models are **formally validated** (e.g., clash detection, semantic consistency) before deployment.
  - **Data Synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enforce **real-time consistency** between PT and DT via **timestamped, authenticated data streams**.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The DT incorporates **probabilistic models** (e.g., sensor noise, environmental variability) for **predictive analytics**.
  - **Verification**: **ODTE metric** quantifies **entanglement** (e.g., 90%+ synchronization accuracy) between PT and DT states.
  - **Validation**: **Post-occupancy data** (e.g., energy savings, comfort metrics) validates DT-driven optimizations against real-world performance. The framework addresses **semantic drift** via **automated model updates** and **stakeholder reviews**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **standardized, protocol-agnostic connections** for PT-DT interaction:
  - **Data Ingestion**: Sensors communicate via **MQTT/HTTP** protocols to **Eclipse Hono**, which normalizes data into a **unified schema** (e.g., JSON-LD) before forwarding to Ditto.
  - **Command Dispatch**: Ditto routes control signals to actuators via **Eclipse Hono**, using **secure, authenticated channels** (e.g., TLS).
  - **Network Architecture**: The system follows a **service mesh pattern**, with **Ditto as the central orchestrator** and **Hono as the edge gateway**, enabling **low-latency, scalable communication**.
  - **Protocol Standards**: Compliance with **OPC UA**, **AMQP**, and **RESTful APIs** for interoperability with legacy systems. The framework supports **plug-and-play integration** of new sensors/actuators via **standardized device profiles**."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed using a **cloud-native, scalable architecture**:
  - **Middleware Hosting**: **Eclipse Ditto and Hono** are deployed as **containerized microservices** (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes) for **horizontal scaling**.
  - **Visualization Hosting**: **Unreal Engine 5** runs on **high-performance GPUs** (e.g., NVIDIA RTX) for **real-time rendering** of 3D dashboards.
  - **Data Storage**: **Time-series databases** (e.g., InfluxDB) and **object storage** (e.g., S3) host **historical and real-time data**.
  - **Deployment Methodology**: **Model-driven deployment** automates the provisioning of Ditto tenants, Hono devices, and Unreal Engine assets from BIM models, ensuring **reproducible, scalable setups**.
  - **Infrastructure**: The system is deployed on **cloud platforms** (e.g., AWS, Azure) or **on-premise data centers**, with **disaster recovery** enabled via **replicated Ditto instances**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with external systems via:
  - **Standardized APIs**: **RESTful and WebSocket interfaces** for **third-party analytics tools** (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) and **ERP/CRM systems**.
  - **IoT Platforms**: Integration with **AWS IoT, Google Cloud IoT**, or **Azure IoT Hub** for **scalable sensor management**.
  - **BIM Collaboration**: **IFC/BCF standards** for **seamless data exchange** with other BIM tools (e.g., Revit, Navisworks).
  - **Enterprise Systems**: **SOAP/XML APIs** for **ERP/HR systems** to correlate DT data with **occupancy schedules** and **maintenance logs**.
  - **Cross-Domain DTs**: **Federated DT architectures** enabling **interoperability** with other infrastructure DTs (e.g., smart grids, urban systems) via **Ditto’s multi-tenant capabilities**."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed through:
  - **Tenant-Based Isolation**: **Eclipse Ditto** enforces **tenant-specific access controls**, ensuring **data isolation** between building owners, facility managers, and third-party service providers.
  - **GDPR Compliance**: **Anonymization of occupancy data** and **right-to-erasure mechanisms** for personal information.
  - **Role-Based Access**: **RBAC policies** restrict data access based on **stakeholder roles** (e.g., engineers vs. managers).
  - **Data Sovereignty**: **On-premise deployment options** for **sensitive infrastructure data**, with **encryption-at-rest** (e.g., AES-256) and **TLS 1.3** for data in transit.
  - **Audit Logs**: **Immutable logs** of all DT interactions (e.g., control commands, data access) for **compliance and forensic analysis**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following **standards and frameworks**:
  - **BIM Standards**: **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** for **semantic interoperability** and **BCF (BIM Collaboration Format)** for **collaboration**.
  - **IoT/OT Standards**: **OPC UA** for **industrial communication**, **MQTT** for **lightweight messaging**, and **AMQP** for **enterprise integration**.
  - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Ditto** (based on **CPS-VAN**) and **Eclipse Hono** (based on **OMA LWM2M**) for **standardized DT management**.
  - **Visualization Standards**: **Unreal Engine 5** with **OpenXR** support for **cross-platform AR/VR integration**.
  - **Control Standards**: **Kafka** for **event streaming** and **RESTful APIs** for **service orchestration**.
  - **Lifecycle Standards**: **ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Reference Architecture)** for **DT governance** and **ISO 55000 (Asset Management)** for **operational alignment**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Authentication**: **OAuth 2.0/JWT** for **user and device authentication** within Ditto/Hono.
  - **Authorization**: **Role-based access control (RBAC)** and **attribute-based encryption (ABE)** for **fine-grained permissions**.
  - **Data Integrity**: **Blockchain-based audit trails** (optional) for **tamper-proof logging** of DT interactions.
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Fail-safe controls**: Ditto enforces **default-safe states** (e.g., emergency shutdowns) for actuators.
    - **Remote override safeguards**: **Multi-factor authentication (MFA)** required for critical commands (e.g., HVAC adjustments).
    - **Physical isolation**: **Air-gapped networks** for **safety-critical systems** (e.g., fire suppression).
  - **Compliance**: **IEC 62443 (Industrial Cybersecurity)** and **NIST SP 800-53** for **risk management** and **incident response planning**."
]
